meta.feed_title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

items.title: Fury wants boxing clash with Joshua after comeback fight against Makhmudov
items.summary: Fury, who returns to the ring against Makhmudov on Saturday, says he wants to face his compatriot Joshua next.

items.title: Thousands of Palestinians pray at Al-Aqsa Mosque after Israel’s 40-day ban
items.summary: Around 3,000 worshippers held morning prayers at Al-Aqsa after Israel lifted restrictions.

items.title: Iran has been bloodied, but it is winning against the US-Israel axis
items.summary: The US and Israel thought they could decimate Iran. But Iran's survival - despite massive human costs - is a victory.

items.title: Eritrea’s AFCON place in doubt after players disappear in South Africa
items.summary: Seven of the 10 players that travelled from Eritrea didn't return home after their 4-1 win over Eswatini on March 31.

items.title: Trump says US forces to stay near Iran, ready for ‘next conquest’
items.summary: US threats against Iran and ongoing Israeli attacks in Lebanon cast doubt on fragile ceasefire efforts.

items.title: The Masters: Golf’s segregated past
items.summary: The Masters has a complicated segregated past, which include the PGA’s “Caucasian-only clause”

items.title: Three life terms for Kashmir’s Aasiya Andrabi fit India’s ‘broader pattern’
items.summary: Legal experts say the 64-year-old grandmother's harsh conviction is mainly based on offensive speech-making.

items.title: UK’s Mandelson tried to get Epstein’s ‘goddaughter’ into 10 Downing Street
items.summary: UK's Mandelson tried to get Epstein’s ‘goddaughter’ access to 10 Downing Street

items.title: Iran war day 41: What’s happening in Lebanon, Middle East and beyond?
items.summary: Lebanon has declared a national day of mourning after Israeli attacks killed at least 254 people in a single day.

items.title: For Gulf states, Hormuz uncertainty casts shadow over US-Iran ceasefire
items.summary: Experts say Gulf countries are wary of the US agreeing to a deal that gives Iran leverage over the vital energy route.

items.title: Man rescued after two weeks trapped in collapsed Mexico mine
items.summary: A man trapped for nearly two weeks in a flooded gold mine in Sinaloa, Mexico, has been rescued by military divers.

items.title: Trump slams NATO over Iran after meeting Rutte, renews Greenland threat
items.summary: US president meets NATO chief, expresses disappointment over member states failing to back war on Iran.

items.title: 13-year-old girl captures terrifying moment Israel bombed Beirut
items.summary: A 13-year-old girl on Snapchat captured the moment Israel began its assault on Beirut.

items.title: Turkish convoy condemns ‘lawless aggression’ of the US and Israel
items.summary: Hundreds of vehicles have driven through Istanbul to condemn the ‘lawless aggression’ of the US and Israel.

items.title: Protesters outside Israeli embassy in London condemn assault on Lebanon
items.summary: Protesters have blocked roads outside the Israeli embassy in London, condemning Israel’s violent strikes on Lebanon.

items.title: US VP JD Vance says Lebanon is not part of the US-Iran ceasefire
items.summary: US Vice President JD Vance says Lebanon is not part of the US-Iran ceasefire.

items.title: Iran war live: Trump threatens action if Tehran fails to comply with deal
items.summary: UN human rights chief Volker Turk describes Israel's attacks on Lebanon as 'horrific', coming so soon after ceasefire.

items.title: ‘Israel must be restrained for US-Iran ceasefire to hold’
items.summary: Former US counterterrorism chief Joe Kent had warned Israel could ‘sabotage’ the US-Iran ceasefire.

items.title: Woman given 15 years for role supplying drugs linked to Matthew Perry death
items.summary: Drug dealer who supplied dose that eventually led to Perry's death in 2023 pleaded guilty to five felony drug counts.

items.title: Americans question Trump’s instinct on Iran war
items.summary: Americans are split on whether to trust Donald Trump's instinct-driven approach to the Iran conflict.

items.title: JD Vance says Iran would be ‘dumb’ to let talks collapse over Lebanon
items.summary: The US vice president says Iran had a 'legitimate misunderstanding' about Lebanon's inclusion in this week's ceasefire.

items.title: Prosecutors move to subpoena Tiger Woods’ prescription drug records
items.summary: Woods pleaded not guilty in his driving under the influence case in Florida last week after rolling his SUV.

items.title: Trump administration signals it is mulling NATO withdrawal after Iran war
items.summary: The US president has lashed out at European partners for declining to contribute military forces to the war on Iran.

items.title: Macron welcomes US-Iran ceasefire and urges Lebanon’s inclusion
items.summary: French President Emmanuel Macron welcomed the US-Iran ceasefire as “very good news".

items.title: Trump threatens 50% tariffs on countries that supply Iran with weapons
items.summary: It's not clear under what legal authority Trump can tack on this tariff, and analysts called it an 'empty threat'.
